notes: HF max_position_embeddings is 131072 for the local LlamaConfig.

The functional stage validated single-layer prefill at batch 32 for seq_len 1, 4, and 8 only; optimized decoder preserves the advertised short prefill contract and validates real-weight prefill at non-aligned seq_len 4 and 8.

Optimized decode validates paged KV decode at batch 32 with a contiguous page table sized for max_seq_len 64 and page_block_size 32, including a nonzero logical position after a prior cache update. This does not raise current_supported_context above the functional contract because long-context prefill/decode was not validated in this stage.

.agents/scripts/check_context_contract.py currently treats any below-HF context as a failure unless DRAM-limited; this stage is below advertised because validation scope is short prefill, not because of a proven DRAM limit.
